name: Antibiotics
description: Cures all illnesses. A must-have for any wasteland medic.

name: Berry Mentats
description: Reduce difficulty of INT tests by 2 (min 0). Lasting duration. Boosts brain function.

name: Buffjet
description: Reduce STR/END test difficulty by 1, +4 Max HP, Gain 3 AP, extra actions cost 1 less AP. Brief.

name: Buffout
description: Re-roll 1d20 on STR/END tests, +3 Max HP. Lasting duration. Anabolic steroids.

name: Bufftats
description: Reduce STR/PER/END test difficulty by 1, +4 Max HP. Lasting. Cocktail of steroids and mentats.

name: Diluted RadAway
description: Heals 2 Radiation damage. Half-strength RadAway.

name: Diluted Rad-X
description: +3 Radiation DR. Half-strength Rad-X.

name: Diluted Stimpak
description: Heals 2 HP. Half-strength Stimpak.

name: Fury
description: +3 Physical DR, +3 DC melee damage, +2 difficulty to PER tests. Lasting. Berserker rage.

name: Glowing Blood Pack
description: Potent restorative. Protects against radiation for a short while.

name: Grape Mentats
description: Reduce CHA test difficulty by 2 (min 0), re-roll 1d20 on Barter tests. Lasting.

name: Jet
description: Extra actions cost 1 less AP. Brief duration. Inhaled stimulant, highly addictive.

name: Jet Fuel
description: Gain 1 free AP at start of each turn. Lasting. Volatile variant of Jet.

name: Mentats
description: Re-roll 1d20 on PER and INT tests. Lasting. Pre-War cognitive enhancer.

name: Orange Mentats
description: Reduce PER test difficulty by 2 (min 0), Aim lets you re-roll 1 extra d20. Lasting.

name: Overdrive
description: +3 DC damage to all attacks, may re-roll up to 3 DC per damage roll. Lasting.

name: Psycho
description: +2 DC damage to all attacks, +3 Physical DR. Lasting. Combat stimulant.

name: Psycho Jet
description: +2 DC damage, +4 Physical DR, gain 4 AP instantly. Brief. Cocktail of Psycho and Jet.

name: Psychobuff
description: +2 DC damage, +4 Max HP, reduce STR/END test difficulty by 1. Lasting.

name: RadAway
description: Heals 4 Radiation damage. Essential anti-radiation treatment.

name: Refreshing Beverage
description: Heals 10 Radiation damage, cures all addictions. The ultimate purification drink.

name: Robot Repair Kit
description: Repairs a robot for 4 HP. Cannot heal robots with Stimpaks.

name: Skeeto Spit
description: +2 Max HP. Lasting. Tribal remedy made from bloodbug parts.

name: Stimpak
description: Heals 4 HP instantly. The most common medical item in the wasteland.

name: Ultra Jet
description: Gain 6 AP instantly, extra actions cost 1 less AP. Brief. Potent Jet variant.

name: Baseball Grenade
description: Thrown explosive. 6DC Physical damage in target zone. Improvised but effective.

name: Frag Grenade
description: Blast weapon. 8DC Physical damage to all in zone. Standard military fragmentation grenade.

name: Molotov Cocktail
description: Blast weapon. 5DC Physical damage + Persistent. Flammable area denial.

name: Plasma Grenade
description: Blast weapon. 10DC Energy damage to all in zone. Merges plasma with explosives.

name: Pulse Grenade
description: Blast weapon. 6DC Energy damage. 4× damage to robots. Anti-robot grenade.

name: Bottlecap Mine
description: Mine. 8DC Physical damage. Classic wasteland trap made from bottlecaps.

name: Frag Mine
description: Mine. 8DC Physical damage. Pressure-plate activated fragmentation mine.

name: Plasma Mine
description: Mine. 10DC Energy damage. Advanced plasma-based mine.

name: Pulse Mine
description: Mine. 6DC Energy damage. 4× damage to robots. EMP mine.

name: Berserk Syringe
description: Target must make END test or attack nearest creature. Causes uncontrollable rage.

name: Bleed-Out Syringe
description: Target suffers Persistent Physical damage. Causes heavy bleeding.

name: Bloatfly Larva Syringe
description: Target takes Physical damage each turn. Injects parasitic bloatfly larvae.

name: Endangerol Syringe
description: Target loses all damage resistances for the scene. Extremely dangerous compound.

name: Lock Joint Syringe
description: Target's movement is impaired. Reduces action economy significantly.

name: Mind Cloud Syringe
description: Target suffers +2 difficulty to all INT and PER tests. Confuses the mind.

name: Pax Syringe
description: Target becomes pacified and will not attack for the scene. Calming agent.

name: Radscorpion Venom Syringe
description: Target suffers Poison damage each turn. Deadly radscorpion venom.

name: Yellow Belly Syringe
description: Target gains +2 difficulty to all CHA tests. Induces cowardice.
